Terms & Conditions

Last updated: 2026

1. Acceptance of Terms

By registering an account on RICA, you acknowledge that you have carefully read, fully understood, and unconditionally agree to be bound by these Terms & Conditions. If you do not accept these terms in their entirety, you are not authorized to create an account or access the platform.

2. Account Responsibility

You bear full responsibility for safeguarding the confidentiality of your login credentials, including your username and password. All actions performed under your account are solely your responsibility. You are required to notify us immediately upon becoming aware of any unauthorized access to or use of your account.

3. Data Storage

All business data entered into RICA — including but not limited to orders, inventory records, financial transactions, customer information, and shipping details — is stored exclusively on your local device via browser storage. RICA does not transmit, upload, or retain any of your business data on external or remote servers.

4. Acceptable Use

You agree to use RICA solely for lawful and legitimate business management purposes. The platform must not be used to store, process, or distribute fraudulent, unlawful, or harmful content. Any violation of this policy may result in immediate account suspension or permanent termination.

5. Privacy

Your recovery email address and phone number are collected and used exclusively for the purpose of account recovery and identity verification. This information is stored locally on your device and is never shared with third parties, except when you explicitly request a verification code — delivered via secure email or SMS through our trusted service providers.

6. Limitation of Liability

RICA is provided on an "as is" basis without warranties of any kind, whether express or implied. We shall not be held liable for any loss of data, interruption of business operations, or damages of any nature arising from the use of, or inability to use, this application.

7. Modifications to Terms

We reserve the right to revise or update these Terms & Conditions at any time without prior notice. Your continued use of the application following any modifications constitutes your acceptance of the updated terms.

8. Contact

For any inquiries or concerns regarding these Terms & Conditions, please do not hesitate to reach out to the RICA system administrator. We are committed to addressing your questions promptly and professionally.
